rationale: Fix critical self-improve safety gaps: content-hash-bound CI approval matching, expanded protected paths covering the orchestrator/registry/main.py surface, branch-reset + fast-forward-merge-back, scoped git add, dirty-worktree guard, stuck-approval retry, and add_skill wiring.
expected_effect: The protected-paths gate can no longer be bypassed by a stale approval; the run-limit and registry surface is now covered by the meta-rule.
rollback_plan: git revert the merge commit of PR #5.
approval_channel: explicit human approval (AskUserQuestion), recorded by agent
